languages.text: "В настоящий момент этот образец задействован в одном из моих опытов в качестве наказания. Я отделил от него все части, которые мешали его участию в эксперименте, но то, что осталось — вполне функционально. И будет оставаться таковым до тех пор, пока его скудный ум не покорится, впитав в себя истинное положение вещей".

"At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."
languages.original_text: "В настоящий момент этот образец задействован в одном из моих опытов в качестве наказания. Я отделил от него все части, которые мешали его участию в эксперименте, но то, что осталось — вполне функционально. И будет оставаться таковым до тех пор, пока его скудный ум не покорится, впитав в себя истинное положение вещей".

traits.locale_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with its participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until its meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

languages.text: "Derzeit ist dieses Versuchsstück zur Bestrafung Teil eines meiner Experimente. Ich habe alle Teile entfernt, die seine Teilnahme an besagtem Experiment erschwert hätten, aber was geblieben ist, funktioniert bestens. Und so wird es auch bleiben, bis sein spärlicher Verstand die tatsächliche Lage der Dinge anerkennt."
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: "Derzeit ist dieses Versuchsstück zur Bestrafung Teil eines meiner Experimente. Ich habe alle Teile entfernt, die seine Teilnahme an besagtem Experiment erschwert hätten, aber was geblieben ist, funktioniert bestens. Und so wird es auch bleiben, bis sein spärlicher Verstand die tatsächliche Lage der Dinge anerkennt."

languages.text: « Ce spécimen est actuellement employé dans l'une de mes expériences, en guise de châtiment. J'ai retiré tous les éléments susceptibles de compromettre sa participation à l'étude, mais il reste parfaitement fonctionnel. Et il en sera ainsi tant que son esprit limité ne se sera pas incliné pour accepter la vérité. »
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: « Ce spécimen est actuellement employé dans l'une de mes expériences, en guise de châtiment. J'ai retiré tous les éléments susceptibles de compromettre sa participation à l'étude, mais il reste parfaitement fonctionnel. Et il en sera ainsi tant que son esprit limité ne se sera pas incliné pour accepter la vérité. »

languages.text: «En estos momentos, el espécimen está en uso en uno de mis experimentos como castigo. Extirpé todas las partes que interferían con su participación en el experimento, pero lo demás es perfectamente funcional. Y lo seguirá siendo hasta que su mísera mente entienda la realidad de su situación y se someta».
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with its participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until its meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: «En estos momentos, el espécimen está en uso en uno de mis experimentos como castigo. Extirpé todas las partes que interferían con su participación en el experimento, pero lo demás es perfectamente funcional. Y lo seguirá siendo hasta que su mísera mente entienda la realidad de su situación y se someta».

languages.text: "Şu anda bu numune, ceza olarak deneylerimden birinde kullanılıyor. Deneye katılımına engel olan tüm parçaları çıkardım ama geriye kalanlar mükemmel şekilde işlevsel. Olayların gerçek durumunu özümseyip o cılız zihni boyun eğene kadar da öyle kalacak."
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with its participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until its meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: "Şu anda bu numune, ceza olarak deneylerimden birinde kullanılıyor. Deneye katılımına engel olan tüm parçaları çıkardım ama geriye kalanlar mükemmel şekilde işlevsel. Olayların gerçek durumunu özümseyip o cılız zihni boyun eğene kadar da öyle kalacak."

languages.text: “目前，作为惩罚，这个样本正被用于我的一项实验。我移除了所有会影响实验的部分，但剩下的部分功能完好。它会继续保持现状，直到它那可怜的意识认清现实，彻底屈服。”
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: “目前，作为惩罚，这个样本正被用于我的一项实验。我移除了所有会影响实验的部分，但剩下的部分功能完好。它会继续保持现状，直到它那可怜的意识认清现实，彻底屈服。”

languages.text: 「この標本は現在、私の実験の一環として罰として使われている。彼の参加を妨げる部分は全て取り除かれたが、残った部分は完全に機能している。そして、彼の貧弱な心が真実を理解するまで、その機能は維持されるだろう。」
languages.original_text: "At present, this specimen is being used in one of my experiments as punishment. I removed all parts that interfered with his participation in the experiment, but what remains is perfectly functional. And it will remain so until his meagre mind submits, having absorbed the true state of affairs."

traits.locale_text: 「この標本は現在、私の実験の一環として罰として使われている。彼の参加を妨げる部分は全て取り除かれたが、残った部分は完全に機能している。そして、彼の貧弱な心が真実を理解するまで、その機能は維持されるだろう。」
